# Diff pairs to publish, one per line. Each line is "BASE...HEAD".
# A diff site is built at /<base_slug>...<head_slug>/ that contains the union
# of files from both branches, with graph nodes colored by status:
#   added (green), changed (orange), deleted (red), unchanged (gray)
# Pairs whose branches are missing on origin are skipped with a warning.
main...v1
v1...v2
